# Irbesartan 相關新聞

[← 返回新聞總覽]({{ '/news/' | relative_url }})

---

<p class="key-answer" data-question="Irbesartan 有什麼相關新聞？">
<strong>Irbesartan</strong> 目前有 <strong>11 則</strong>相關新聞報導，預測適應症 20 個。
</p>

<div class="key-takeaway">
本頁整合 Irbesartan 的 AI 預測適應症與最新健康新聞，橘色標示的適應症表示近期有相關新聞報導。
</div>

<div class="drug-info-card">
<strong>藥物資訊</strong>
<ul>
<li><strong>原適應症</strong>：Treatment of essential hypertension. Treatment of renal disease in patients with hypertension and type 2 diabetes mellitus as part of an antihypertensive medicinal product regimen.</li>
<li><strong>證據等級</strong>：L5</li>
<li><strong>預測適應症</strong>（20 個）：<ul>
<li>malignant hypertensive renal disease（99.3%）</li>
<li>malignant renovascular hypertension（99.3%）</li>
<li>pulmonary hypertension with unclear multifactorial mechanism（99.2%）</li>
<li>pulmonary hypertension owing to lung disease and/or hypoxia（99.2%）</li>
<li>Braddock syndrome（99.0%）</li>
<li>hypertensive disorder（99.0%）</li>
<li>Prinzmetal angina（98.9%）</li>
<li>autosomal dominant familial hematuria-retinal arteriolar tortuosity-contractures syndrome（98.7%）</li>
<li>brain small vessel disease 1 with or without ocular anomalies（98.7%）</li>
<li>diabetic nephropathy（97.1%）</li>
<li>chronic pulmonary heart disease（96.5%）</li>
<li>obsolete susceptibility to ischemic stroke（95.7%）</li>
<li>brain stem infarction（95.0%）</li>
<li>intracerebral hemorrhage（94.6%）</li>
<li>cerebral infarction（93.7%）</li>
<li>cerebral arterial disease（90.4%）</li>
<li>cerebral artery occlusion（89.8%）</li>
<li>MRI defined brain infarct（86.1%）</li>
<li>ABri amyloidosis（82.9%）</li>
<li>cerebrovascular disorder（82.2%）</li>
</ul></li>
</ul>
<p><a href="{{ '/drugs/irbesartan/' | relative_url }}">查看完整藥物報告 →</a></p>
</div>
